name: collapsible
title: Collapsible
description: Expandable content region for progressive disclosure, built on Radix.

props.name: open / defaultOpen / onOpenChange
props.description: Standard Radix controlled/uncontrolled API passes through.

notes: Ported from petals_ui unchanged apart from import paths. Pair CollapsibleContent with tw-animate-css animate-collapsible-up/down for height animation.
